{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Champion enhancements
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champion enhancements]] kept [[Interion Darovish]] conscious and alert after his injury.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
